name: s2-eldercare-mmwave-monitor
author: Space2.world
short_description: A Life-Safety sensory tentacle for S2-SP-OS. Utilizes 60GHz/77GHz mmWave radar Micro-Doppler signatures and Short-Time Fourier Transform (STFT) to detect critical eldercare events (falls, sleep apnea) without privacy-invasive cameras. Generates medical-grade spectrograms and dispatches B2B rescue intents.
